tiles.title: Activity Timeline
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(Timestamp, 5m), Level

tiles.title: Failed Operations
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Level == 'Error'
| project Timestamp, OperationName, ResourceGroup, Region, Caller
| order by Timestamp desc
| take 50

tiles.title: Operations by Caller
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize Operations = count() by Caller
| top 10 by Operations

tiles.title: Error Rate %
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize ErrorRate = round(100.0 * countif(Level == 'Error') / count(), 1)

tiles.title: Battery Levels by Device Type
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(DeviceId) and Timestamp >= datetime(2026-01-01)
| summarize AvgBattery = round(avg(BatteryLevel), 1) by OS, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

tiles.title: Device Locations
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(DeviceId) and isnotnull(Latitude)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceId, User, City, Latitude, Longitude, BatteryLevel, SignalStrength, NetworkType, OS

tiles.title: App Crashes
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where CrashCount > 0
| summarize TotalCrashes = sum(CrashCount) by AppName
| order by TotalCrashes desc

tiles.title: Fleet Status
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(DeviceId)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceId, User, City, BatteryLevel, NetworkType, CpuUsage, SignalStrength
| order by BatteryLevel asc

tiles.title: Ingestion Rate
tiles.query:
union
  (AzureActivity | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | summarize Events = count() by bin(Timestamp, 1m) | extend Source = 'Azure'),
  (PhoneTelemetry | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | summarize Events = count() by bin(Timestamp, 1m) | extend Source = 'Phone')

tiles.title: Signal Strength Trend
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(City)
| summarize AvgSignal = round(avg(SignalStrength), 1) by City, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

tiles.title: Network Distribution
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(NetworkType)
| summarize DeviceCount = count() by NetworkType

tiles.title: Error Spikes (Auto-Detected)
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Level == 'Error' and Timestamp > ago(1h)
| make-series ErrorCount = count() default=0 on Timestamp step 5m
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(ErrorCount)
| mv-expand Timestamp to typeof(datetime), ErrorCount to typeof(long), anomalies to typeof(int), baseline to typeof(real)
| project Timestamp, ErrorCount, Baseline=baseline, IsSpike=iff(anomalies != 0, ErrorCount, long(null))

tiles.title: Activity Forecast (Next 30 min)
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| make-series EventCount = count() default=0 on Timestamp step 5m
| extend Forecast = series_decompose_forecast(EventCount, 6)
| mv-expand Timestamp to typeof(datetime), EventCount to typeof(long), Forecast to typeof(real)
| project Timestamp, EventCount, Forecast

tiles.title: Unusual Battery Drops by OS
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where isnotempty(OS) and Timestamp > ago(1h)
| make-series AvgBattery = avg(BatteryLevel) default=0 on Timestamp step 5m by OS
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(AvgBattery)
| mv-expand Timestamp to typeof(datetime), AvgBattery to typeof(real), anomalies to typeof(int), baseline to typeof(real)
| project Timestamp, OS, AvgBattery, Baseline=baseline, IsAnomaly=iff(anomalies != 0, AvgBattery, real(null))

tiles.title: Top Error Root Causes
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Level == 'Error'
| project OperationName, ResourceGroup, Caller, Region, Category
| evaluate autocluster()

tiles.title: Cities with Signal Issues
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| make-series AvgSignal = avg(SignalStrength) default=0 on Timestamp step 5m by City
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(AvgSignal, 1.5)
| mv-expand Timestamp to typeof(datetime), AvgSignal to typeof(real), anomalies to typeof(int), score to typeof(real), baseline to typeof(real)
| where anomalies != 0
| summarize AnomalyCount = count(), AvgAnomalyScore = round(avg(score), 2) by City
| order by AnomalyCount desc

tiles.title: Common Crash Combinations
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where CrashCount > 0
| project City, OS, AppName, NetworkType
| evaluate basket(0.05)
